title: Voxyland
description: Voxyland is a Fabric 1.21.10 modpack focused on a modern, immersive sandbox experience that expands Minecraft without sacrificing performance.
body:
# **Voxyland**
Voxyland is a Fabric 1.21.10 modpack focused on a modern, immersive sandbox experience that !s Minecraft without sacrificing performance.

![Minecraft valley with shaders.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3c43aadc370a3e15b5a3bd0ee636b12d72cd208.jpeg)

It features:

🌍 Deep world generation (Terralith, Tectonic, Incendium, Repurposed Structures, Dungeons & Taverns)

🧱 High-quality building and visuals (Macaw’s mods, Beautify, Continuity, LambDynamicLights)

⚡ Carefully balanced performance optimizations (Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix, Noisium)

🧬 Expanded gameplay with new mobs, structures, progression systems, and quality-of-life improvements

⭐ Voxy as the core mod, defining the pack’s identity with advanced systems and mechanics

Voxyland is designed for long-term worlds and servers, delivering a rich, lively world that feels detailed, smooth, and stable even with a large mod selection.

Download Photon Shaders (recommended) or any shader of your choice from Modrinth:
👉 Photon Shaders [https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)
